## Description

Provide a concise summary of the changes in this PR:
- What does this PR do?
- Why is this change needed?
- How do the changes work?
- What approaches were considered?
- Any other related PRs or background?

---

## References
Link the corresponding Jira ticket(s) here
Ticket(s) should preferably be on [Backend Board](https://aitastic.atlassian.net/jira/software/c/projects/BE/boards/8)

If there are any related PRs, then they should also be linked here.

Example:
- [BE-XXX : Title](https://aitastic.atlassian.net/browse/BE-XXX)
- [PR #XXX : Title](https://github.com/aitastic/repo/pull/XXX)

---

## Change Types
Please tick the relevant option(s):
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New/Removed feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Documentation update

---

## Checklist
### General Guidelines
- [ ] Did you add labels? At least one of the following labels should be set:
  - bug 💥 
  - feature 🛠️
  - documentation 📝 
  - refactoring 💻 
  - maintenance 🔧 
- [ ] Does PR consist of less than 1000 changes lines of code?
- [ ] Are new tests added to cover the changes?
- [ ] Was documentation updated where necessary? Possible locations:
  - [ ] Code comments
  - [ ] Docstrings, preferably in [Google style](https://sphinxcontrib-napoleon.readthedocs.io/en/latest/example_google.html)
  - [ ] README.md
  - [ ] [Confluence](https://aitastic.atlassian.net/wiki/spaces/AS/overview)
- [ ] If any secrets (keys, tokens, credentials, etc.) were involved in this PR, were they all removed/masked?
- [ ] No unnecessary files or console logs included

### Organizational Requirements
- [ ] PR must be linked to a Jira ticket
- [ ] Jira ticket must specify whether it's a **bug fix** or a **feature**

---

## Additional Notes
Any other information reviewers should be aware of
